author: builder
summary: Isolated database credentials from module-load-time process.env reads and Flag checks. Migrated adapter.ts defaultLayer from Layer.suspend(Flag.check) to Layer.unwrap(Effect.gen(DatabaseConfig)). DatabaseConfig.service reads credentials via Config.redacted and stores them as Redacted values until explicit unwrap at connection point.

files_modified.description: Made url field optional via Config.option for SQLite fallback; added defaultLayer export with Layer.orDie
Wired DatabaseConfig.defaultLayer into mergeAll via Layer.provideMerge
Changed defaultLayer from Layer.suspend(Flag check) to Layer.unwrap(Effect.gen(DatabaseConfig)); removed import { Flag } and process.env['OPENCODE_DATABASE_SSL'] read

files_created.description: Database security doctrine documenting credential isolation strategy, leak paths, and mitigation patterns

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Database config url field is optional (Option<Redacted>) for SQLite fallback
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: database-config.ts:5 uses Config.option for url field

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: adapter.ts uses Layer.unwrap instead of Flag check at module load
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: adapter.ts:298-307 — Layer.unwrap(Effect.gen(function* { const config = yield* DatabaseConfig.Service }))

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: No Flag import or process.env reads in adapter.ts at module load
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: grep for 'Flag' and 'process.env' in adapter.ts returns zero results

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Credentials are Redacted until explicit unwrap at connection point
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: database-config.ts:5 uses Config.redacted; adapter.ts:302 uses Redacted.value(config.url.value) at connection point

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Security doctrine exists documenting leak paths and mitigation

results: Database credential isolation complete. DatabaseConfig reads credentials via Config.redacted and stores as Redacted values. adapter.ts defaultLayer uses Layer.unwrap to resolve DatabaseConfig at layer-construction time (NOT module-load time). No Flag or process.env reads remain in adapter.ts. DatabaseConfig.url is optional via Config.option, allowing SQLite fallback when OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL is not set. DatabaseConfig is wired into both app-runtime and bootstrap-runtime layers. Security doctrine documents all leak paths and mitigations.

deferred_seams.seam: Phase 2.0 credential isolation audit: Audit of all process.env spreads in subprocess spawning paths (shell.ts, lsp/server.ts) to ensure OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL never reaches subprocess env
deferred_seams.reconnection_path: Run audit script matching process.env spread patterns; add explicit filter or exclusion list
